001package net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.menu;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.button.Button;
004import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
005import org.bukkit.event.inventory.ClickType;
006import org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack;
007import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
008
009public interface RenderedButton {
010
011    static @NotNull RenderedButton create(@NotNull Button source) {
012        return new RenderedButtonImpl(source);
013    }
014
015    int getSlot();
016
017    @NotNull ItemStack getIcon();
018
019    boolean shouldUpdate();
020
021    void updateIcon(@NotNull Player viewer);
022
023    void clickButton(@NotNull Player clicker, @NotNull ClickType clickType);
024}
